message:
fix(e2e): remove duplicate #cost id + add #cost TOC entry

- Removed the redundant id="cost" on the section wrapper that duplicated
  the id already present on the inner anchor div (data-anchor="true"),
  which was triggering Playwright strict-mode violations.
- Added the missing #cost link to the table of contents so the cost/hook
  section is reachable from the TOC alongside the other restructured
  sections.

All 10 wills-estate-article.spec.ts tests pass on chromium.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -611,7 +611,7 @@ export function WillsEstateArticle() { {/* ========== HOOK + COST TABLE ========== */} -
+

Contents

    +
  1. + handleTocJump(event, "cost")}> + One weekend, roughly $120, instead of $20,000 + +
  2. handleTocJump(event, "what-is-it")}> What is an AI agent, and what is a skill?
